experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Shipped multi-channel B2B AI agent (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) with Claude Sonnet and RAG across 7 clients, 1,000+ orders
Built React and Python internal tools: Intercom ticketing (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP interface, AWS S3 store for 250+ files
Automated output-validation and human-in-the-loop QA layer; iterated prompts and vector-store memory, raising precision across 1,000+ orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built Python wrapper around Grafanalib on 3-person team, achieving 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5)
Migrated 7+ legacy dashboards across 3 active Grafana environments with unit tests on the dashboard layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building professor review platform for 30,000+ students (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Drizzle ORM)
Shipped review submission flow and Python GraphQL webscraper for course data ingestion across agile sprints

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Owned end-to-end at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), Clerk JWT auth
Designed dual-model Claude pipeline (Haiku 4.5 for skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for re-ranking) at 95%+ accuracy; SSE-streamed progress to React frontend
Parallel processing 30+ positions, 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated PSG sleep-stage scoring platform with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy vs clinician labels
Async EEG pipeline (Redis + ARQ): distributed EDF parsing, spectral features, Scikit-Learn classifiers per patient
Sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Built autonomous lead-qualification SMS agent for Bay Area real estate client: FSM-driven pipeline with intent classification, debounce sweeper, Cal.com auto-booking
Multi-service integration: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude on async Postgres with Alembic migrations
Live in production, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach
